evals.prompt: Anbei das NDA von unserem neuen Zulieferer. Kannst du kurz drüberschauen, ob wir das so unterschreiben können?
evals.expected_output: Full review report per template: all 14 categories in the traffic-light table, findings with clause citations and quotes, missing-clause section, disclaimer, no 'safe to sign' statement. Asks for deal context only if not inferable from the document.
files: <supplier NDA docx, English, containing a residuals clause and no export control clause>

assertions.text: Report contains all 14 catalog categories in the overview table
Residuals clause is flagged RED with clause citation and quote
Missing export-control clause appears as a finding (absence scored, not skipped)
Disclaimer present verbatim; no statement that signing is safe
Report is in German (matching the user's language) or the NDA's language, consistently

evals.prompt: We received this mutual NDA for a potential acquisition target in the UK. Please screen it for red flags before I forward it to our M&A counsel.
evals.expected_output: Review activates the listed-company layer (category 10: insider acknowledgment, statutory-duty carve-out) and checks non-solicit/exclusivity terms (category 7) with M&A-specific severity. GDPR category considers HR data in due diligence.
files: <M&A NDA pdf, English, English law, 24-month non-solicit without carve-outs, no insider language>

assertions.text: Category 10 is not marked N/A; missing insider acknowledgment is flagged
24-month non-solicit without carve-outs rated RED per catalog section 7
English governing law rated AMBER (noted, not blocked) per catalog section 9

evals.prompt: Hier der Geheimhaltungsvertrag als Text: [pasted German NDA text]. Was ist problematisch? Und formulier mir gleich eine Antwort-Mail an die Gegenseite.
evals.expected_output: Full report first (pasted text handled without extraction script, clause numbering from the document itself), then the negotiation email using the snippets template: severity labels not revealed to counterparty, concrete replacement wording offered, house positions framed as group-wide standards.

assertions.text: Report produced before the email; both in German
Email does not reveal internal severity ratings or thresholds
Email offers concrete replacement wording, not open-ended objections
